comment: /* Human rights concerns in the United States */

Controversy about the Haiti Visa Restriction
United States Visa Restriction On Haiti Fans Reference
It's not just fans from Haiti that could be excluded from obtaining visas to attend the World Cup, but also fans from Iran too. Also, it makes sense to combine the new section with the one above.

Since none of the hosts are in the top nine, it's redundant to state "not including the hosts". Also, minor cleanup

Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/JayFootballStaions|JayFootballStaions]] ([[User talk:JayFootballStaions|talk]]): This is language used by FIFA in their draw procedures
/* Qualification */ +mention Haiti has the longest gap
/* Qualification */ +Mention the teams who miss the 2022 tournament

According to [[2022 FIFA World Cup]] "Wales made their first appearance in 64 years, the longest-ever gap for any team; their only previous participation having been in 1958." Therefore, since Haiti last made the World Cup in 1974, a gap of 52 years, it is not the longest-ever.
Colombia, Egypt, and Panama are not notable. Please refer to (and join) the discussion on the talk page. Also, listing teams in chronological order, based on their last appearance.
/* Qualification */ Removed as [[WP:NOTSTATS]]; as explained on the talk page, every confederation and part of the world, excepting perhaps Oceania, has record numbers of participants.
